company.name: Skynet
company.tagline: Launch faster with a service website built for clarity, proof, and conversion.
company.description: Skynet is the demo company shipped with this template. It shows how a modern services firm can package positioning, proof, and content into a fast, easy-to-rebrand site.
company.location: Remote-first, serving North America and Europe

seo.default_description: A fast Astro template for agencies, consultancies, and service firms that care about performance, SEO, and answer-engine visibility.

llms.purpose: Skynet uses this site to explain its services, show proof of work, publish insights, and capture new inquiries through a configurable contact flow.
notes: Content is written in an answer-first style with clear headings and scannable sections.
Services, work, and insights live in structured content collections.
Organization, service, article, FAQ, and breadcrumb schema may appear when relevant.

content_notes: Lead with the direct answer before supporting detail.
Use clear heading hierarchy and scannable lists.
Keep definitions, checklists, and FAQs easy to extract.

footer.headline: Build a services website that feels fast, credible, and easy to customize.
footer.subheadline: This demo ships with content collections, structured data, AEO-friendly copy patterns, and configurable contact handling.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Skynet. Replace with your company name. | [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy) | [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)

form.successMessage: Thanks. Your message has been captured. Replace the demo endpoint in src/data/site.json to make this form live.
form.errorMessage: This demo form is not connected yet. Update src/data/site.json with your REST API endpoint.
